# RevisionGrade

RevisionGrade is The Literary AI Partner for manuscript diagnosis, author-controlled revision, and professional submission preparation.

## Core positioning

RevisionGrade helps serious writers evaluate manuscripts, diagnose structural and narrative issues, revise with evidence, protect author voice, and prepare professional submission materials.

RevisionGrade is not a generic chatbot, grammar checker, or blind AI rewriter. The platform emphasizes diagnosis before repair, evidence before verdict, and author control before revision.

## Key public pages

- Resources: https://www.revisiongrade.com/resources

- Privacy and Research Controls: https://www.revisiongrade.com/privacy-research-controls

## Evaluation proof pages

RevisionGrade proof pages are designed to publish evaluation reports only. They do not publish full manuscripts, full chapters, or extended copyrighted manuscript text.

Public-domain sample report pages:

- The Awakening: https://www.revisiongrade.com/sample-ai-novel-critique-the-awakening
- Dracula: https://www.revisiongrade.com/sample-ai-novel-critique-dracula
- The Wonderful Wizard of Oz: https://www.revisiongrade.com/sample-ai-novel-critique-wizard-of-oz

Founder evaluation case-study pages:

- Cartel Babies: https://www.revisiongrade.com/founder-case-study-cartel-babies
- Let the River Decide: https://www.revisiongrade.com/founder-case-study-let-the-river-decide
- The Lost World of MythOAmphibia: https://www.revisiongrade.com/founder-case-study-lost-world-of-mythoamphibia

## Product boundaries

RevisionGrade does not guarantee literary-agent interest, representation, publication, sales, reviews, commercial performance, or market timing.

RevisionGrade does not claim that short excerpts support full-manuscript continuity analysis. Short-form evaluation is scoped differently from long-form and long-form multi-layer evaluation.

RevisionGrade evaluation reports and case-study pages should not expose full unpublished manuscripts.
